resolution.note: Phase 4 complete. ChromaDB replaced by scripts/vector_store.py (SQLite-backed, in-process numpy cosine over chunk_embeddings). backfill_concepts.py and migrate_to_sqlite_embeddings.py deleted as obsolete one-shots. Latent retriever bug (Title Case tradition paths) fixed as collateral. data/vectordb/ deleted (1.1 MB), chromadb dropped from README pip line, config/embedding.toml simplified. 37 tests pass, end-to-end export still produces clean 10 MB artifact.
